snapshot.content: Cycle 311: Added interactive search/filter to the memory evolution page (docs/memory.html). Users can now type keywords to find specific learnings — matching dots in the scatter plot are highlighted while non-matches dim out, and a results panel shows matching entries with highlighted text. 4 of 6 memory viz tasks are complete. 2 remaining: summary metrics banner with narrative sections, and site navigation integration.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: add summary metrics banner and narrative sections to memory.html (task 5 of 6)

recent_outcomes.summary: Added search/filter box to memory.html with keyword matching, results panel, and scatter plot highlighting
Reflection cycle: board review, proposed journey timeline goal, learning hygiene sweep
Added confidence histogram and age-vs-confidence scatter plot to memory.html
